name: io.github.mharnett/google-gsc
description: Google Search Console MCP: search analytics, URL inspection, site management.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Service-account mode: path to a service account JSON key file. Optional -- provide this OR the OAuth variables below.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_GSC_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: User-OAuth mode: OAuth 2.0 Desktop-app client ID from your own Google Cloud project.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_GSC_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: User-OAuth mode: OAuth 2.0 client secret paired with GOOGLE_GSC_CLIENT_ID.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_GSC_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: User-OAuth mode: refresh token minted by the OAuth helper (get-refresh-token.cjs / mcp-gsc-auth).
